_comment: codelens-plugin dev uses the DEDICATED dev daemon on :7739 (label dev.codelens.mcp-dev, binary codelens-mcp-http-dev). Rebuild it freely with scripts/redeploy-dev-daemon.sh — the shared consumption daemon on :7839 (global config, other projects) is never touched, so dogfooding this repo no longer drops other projects' CodeLens sessions.
